task: Using only the embedded packet (metric map, four records, limits, budget, sensitivity, and thresholds), compute derived metrics and normalized risk per record, classify each record (fail/warn/pass) using the provided risk formula and thresholds, flag under-supported or contradictory records as needs_review, identify the smallest defensible scheduling intervention per record without using proprietary DCC software or external measurements, produce a reschedule spreadsheet (render_reschedule.xlsx) with formulas/executable logic and validation checks, and a production_update.md describing rationale, record-level citations, sensitivity analysis, and a final recommendation table suitable for expert review.
